OrchardBridge v1.2026.06.23 是第一個準備發布的版本。:
OrchardBridge v1.2026.06.23 is the first release-ready version. The version label uses vMajor.YYYY.MM.DD so future releases can be matched to their release dates.

Author, email, GitHub, and sponsorship links can be adjusted to match the final repository name.
PNG 是無損格式：0 最快但檔案大，9 檔案較小但較慢。: PNG is lossless: 0 is fastest/largest, 9 is smaller/slower.

切換語言後會自動儲存並重新啟動軟體。語言檔位於 locales 資料夾；若某些字: Changing language will save settings and restart the app. Traditional Chinese and English are fully supported now; other languages currently use the English UI as a base.

整機備份可能需要先在裝置螢幕上輸入密碼。\n\n請確認：\n1. 裝置已解鎖並信:
Full backup may require entering the device passcode on the device screen.

Please confirm:
1. The device is unlocked and trusts this computer.
2. If prompted, enter the device passcode to allow backup.
3. Do not unplug USB during backup.

Backup folder:
{dest}

Start now?
整機備份會將手機所有資料（通訊錄、簡訊、應用程式資料、設定等）\n完整備份到電腦:
Full backup stores iPhone data such as contacts, messages, app data, and settings on this computer.
The output is compatible with iTunes/Finder-style backups.

• The backup folder is timestamped so old backups are not overwritten.
• Keep the iPhone unlocked and connected during backup.
• Depending on phone size and USB speed, this may take from minutes to hours.
是否開啟 GitHub Releases 下載新版？: Open GitHub Releases to download the new version?
未偵測到 Apple Mobile Device / usbmux 連線橋接服務: Apple Mobile Device / usbmux bridge was not detected. Windows Explorer visibility does not guarantee this service is available. Install or repair Apple Devices/iTunes Apple Mobile Device Support, then try again.
每次執行都會自動儲存 log。目前 log：{log_path}: A runtime log is saved automatically for every run. Current log: {log_path}
無法從 iPhone 讀取檔案: Unable to read the file from iPhone
無法從裝置讀取檔案: Unable to read the file from device

目前沒有可開啟的 log 檔。: There is no log file to open right now.
直接刪除，不進資源回收桶: Delete permanently, not to Recycle Bin
確定要恢復所有設定為預設值嗎？設定會立即儲存，只有語言、外觀或字體大小實際需要變: Restore all settings to defaults? Settings will be saved immediately. The app restarts only if language, appearance, or font size actually changes.
程式仍在背景執行，已縮小到 Windows 右下角系統匣。點系統匣圖示可重新開啟: The app is still running in the background. It has been minimized to the Windows system tray.
等待 iPhone 連線中... 請確認 USB、解鎖並信任此電腦: Waiting for iPhone... Check USB, unlock the phone, and trust this computer
等待裝置連線中... 請確認 USB、解鎖並信任此電腦: Waiting for device... Check USB, unlock the phone, and trust this computer
自動偵測 iPhone 中... 請用 USB 連接並點選『信任此電腦』: Auto detecting iPhone... Connect via USB and tap Trust This Computer
自動偵測裝置中... 請用 USB 連接並點選『信任此電腦』: Auto detecting device... Connect via USB and tap Trust This Computer

請先設定備份儲存位置！: Please set the backup destination folder first.
請先選取要備份的照片！: Please select the photos or videos to back up first.
